examples: He was watching the classic film Winnie the Pooh and the Blustery Day.
The day was cold and blustery.
It's a cold night here, with intermittent rain showers and a blustery wind.
One morning last fall, I drove north from Boston to the blustery coastal town of Ipswich.
But she held her nerve to dominate a tense final set in blustery conditions.
